channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Mullin pushes states to comply with election demands, echoing Trump’s claims about midterm risks
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin has warned state officials they could lose funding or face investigations if they don’t follow President Donald Trump’s election security demands.

item.title: Lawmakers demand answers after ‘bombshell’ report about ICE officer shooting in Maine
Crews scamble to more water rescues in Texas after days of punishing rains
